awk '{
  if ($0 ~ /^\s*#/ || $0 ~ /^\s*$/) {
    print;
    next;
  }
  if ($2 == "/boot") {
    # options field is $4
    split($4, opts, ",");
    found=0;

  print;
}' /etc/fstab > /tmp/fstab_new
